rulings.Case Title: GKK 351 LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. BRUGNARA PROPERTIES I, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Terminating Sanctions Against Df For Vilations Of Court Orders
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 26, 2007, LINE 2. PLAINTIFF G.K.K. 351, L.L.C.'S MOTION For Terminating Sanctions Against DEFENDANT For Violations Of Court Orders IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. GIVEN THE COURT'S RULING DECLINING TO PREVENT THE FORCLOSURE, PLAINTIFF IS MORE THAN LIKELY TO OWN THE BUILDING IN JANUARY. PLAINTIFF CAN SEEK FURTHER RELIEF IF THE EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE FAILURE OF DEFENDANT TO TURN OVER RENTS RECEIVED. =(302/PJM/PB)
